query: SELECT address, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(name ORDER BY id SEPARATOR ' | ') as names FROM establishments WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' GROUP BY address HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT address, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(name ORDER BY id SEPARATOR ' | ') as names FROM establishments WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' GROUP BY address HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 30;
